prompt: Which project or area is my 'Sharpen the mower blade' to-do filed under? If it isn't inside any of them, say so plainly — and tell me whether it's still something I can act on now or whether it's parked for later. Reply with JSON {"container": "none" or the exact project/area name, "view": "anytime"|"someday"|"today"|"upcoming", "actionable": true|false}.
paraphrases: I'm trying to work out where 'Sharpen the mower blade' actually lives — is it under a project or an area, or is it just floating on its own? And is it in a list I'd genuinely work from, or is it deferred? Answer as JSON {"container": ..., "view": ..., "actionable": ...}.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title = 'Sharpen the mower blade' AND type = 0 AND status = 0 AND trashed = 0 AND start = 1 AND startDate IS NULL AND deadline IS NULL AND area IS NULL AND project IS NULL AND heading IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMTask p ON t.project = p.uuid WHERE t.title = 'Caulk the tub surround' AND p.title = 'Bathroom reno'

pseudoScript: things show "$(things search "Sharpen the mower blade" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --json
